channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Downing Street rejects US claim of ‘two-tiered policing’ over Henry Nowak death - UK politics live
item.description: Downing Street rejects US claim of ‘two-tiered policing’ over Henry Nowak death - UK politics live

item.title: Novara Media: Andy Burnham Declines to Call Israel’s Mass Killings in Gaza a Genocide

item.title: The Times: Andy Burnham promises pubs a 20% rates cut if he becomes prime minister - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham needed to distance himself from Starmer’s ‘toxic’ Labour to boost hopes of by-election win, allies say

item.title: FT UK Politics: The Nowak murder: when tragedy meets politics

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Lammy hits back at Trump administration’s ‘two-tier policing’ claim over Henry Nowak’s murder
